acceptance.title: 1. Data Collection
acceptance.content: We collect information that you provide directly to us when you create an account, use our services, or communicate with us.

use.title: 2. Use of Information
use.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, and to develop new ones.

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not share your personal information with third parties except as described in this policy.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using Secure Authorities services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

usage.title: 2. Use of Services
usage.content: You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.

ip.title: 3. Intellectual Property
ip.content: All content and materials available on our services are the property of Secure Authorities or its licensors.

encryption.title: 1. Encryption
encryption.content: All data is encrypted at rest and in transit using industry-standard protocols.

infrastructure.title: 2. Infrastructure
infrastructure.content: Our infrastructure is hosted in highly secure data centers with 24/7 monitoring.

compliance.title: 3. Compliance
compliance.content: We regularly undergo third-party security audits to ensure compliance with global standards.
